title: Why NRG Energy's Stock Is Plummeting This Week
text: This utility went shopping, and shareholders aren't happy with the purchase.

title: SHAREHOLDER ALERT: Weiss Law Investigates Vivint Smart Home, Inc.
text: NEW YORK , Dec. 7, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Weiss Law is investigating possible breaches of fiduciary duty and other violations of law by the board of directors of Vivint Smart Home, Inc. ("Vivint" or the "Company") (NYSE: VVNT), in connection with the proposed acquisition of the Company by NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE: NRG). Under the terms of the merger agreement, the Company's shareholders will receive $12.00 in cash for each share of Vivint common stock owned.

title: NRG Energy And Vivint: Paying For Transformation, The Street Prefers Buybacks
text: NRG Energy, Inc. stepped up with nearly $3 billion in cash to acquire its way into the emerging connected home market with the acquisition of Vivint Smart Home. NRG Energy shares sold off sharply on the news; investors seem unhappy with the additional debt, the entry into a new (and competitive market), and the lack of near-term buybacks.

title: Buy It: NRG Energy Plunges On Vivint Deal, Yield Soars To 4.35%
text: At current pixel time, the stock of NRG Energy is off 15% after announcing a deal to acquire Vivint Smart Home for $2.8 billion in an all-cash transaction. This is an overreaction in my opinion, giving investors an excellent entry point into NRG stock, which - after the drop - is now yielding 4.35%.

title: Why Vivint Smart Home Stock Is Soaring, and NRG Is Tumbling, Today
text: The smart-home product maker and Texas utility are coming together in a $5 billion deal.

title: NRG Energy to buy Vivint Smart Home for $2.8B
text: NRG Energy announced it's acquisition of Vivant Smart Home for $2.8 billion deal that to capitalize on synergies between the electricity producer and smart devices company.

title: Vivint Smart Home shares shoot higher on NRG Energy deal
text: Shares in Vivint Smart Home Inc, the maker of Amazon Echo and Google Home, shot up after it emerged the company will be bought by NRG Energy (NYSE:NRG) Inc for $2.8 billion in cash. Under the terms of the deal, which has been unanimously approved by both company boards, NRG will pay $12 a share - a 35.5% premium to Vivint's closing share price on Monday.

title: Utility Stock Plummets on New Acquisition
text: NRG Energy Inc (NYSE:NRG) stock is plummeting today, down 14% at $35.10 at last glance, after news that the utility name will acquire Vivint Smart Home (VVNT) for $12 per share, or $5.2 billion -- including $2.8 billion in cash transaction and $2.4 billion in debt.

title: Shareholder Alert: Ademi LLP investigates whether Vivint Smart Home, Inc. has obtained a Fair Price in its Transaction with NRG
text: MILWAUKEE , Dec. 6, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Ademi LLP is investigating Vivint (NYSE: VVNT) for possible breaches of fiduciary duty and other violations of law in its transaction with NRG.  Click here to learn how to join the action https://www.ademilaw.com/case/vivint-smart-home-inc or call Guri Ademi toll-free at 866-264-3995.

title: Vivint Smart Home (VVNT) Stock Surges 30% on NRG Energy Deal
text: Vivint Smart Home (NYSE: VVNT ) is jumping more than 32% today after NRG Energy (NYSE: NRG ) agreed to buy the company for $2.8 billion in cash. The total value of the deal, including Vivint's debt, is $5.2 billion.

title: Why NRG Energy (NRG) Is Buying Vivint Smart Home (VVNT) For $2.8 Billion
text: NRG Energy (NRG) announced it is buying Vivint Smart Home (VVNT) for $2.8 billion. These are the details.

title: Why NRG Energy Is Buying Vivint Smart Home
text: Acquiring the smart home platform company facilitates NRG's push into the consumer segment, says the energy and utilities company.

title: NRG Energy to Buy Vivint Smart Home for $2.8 Billion
text: Deal for Vivint, which offers integrated home systems that include security, lighting and other services, would accelerate NRG's consumer-focused growth strategy.

title: NRG Energy buying Vivint Smart Home in $5.2 billion deal
text: NRG Energy Inc. NRG, -0.99% said Tuesday it will pay $12 a share or $2.8 billion in cash for Vivint Smart Home Inc. VVNT, -4.67% and assume $2.4 billion of the company's debt for a total deal value of $5.2 billion. The price of $12 a share is a 33% premium to Vivint's closing share price on Monday.

title: NRG Energy, Inc. to Acquire Vivint Smart Home, Inc.
text: HOUSTON & PROVO, Utah--( BUSINESS WIRE )--NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE: NRG) and Vivint Smart Home, Inc. (NYSE: VVNT) today announced they have entered into a definitive agreement under which NRG will acquire Vivint for $12 per share or $2.8 billion in an all-cash transaction with an implied multiple of 6.3x run-rate Enterprise Value to Adjusted EBITDA. The agreement has been unanimously approved by the boards of directors of both companies.
